creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
look at the makefile. see what it does.

do a 'make exact'  cd into work/*
do a ../configure --help. see if there is a knob to turn off docs.
use 'sed' (repinline_cmd) to patch Makefile.(in).

one of those.

if you need help, I suggest you join the FreeBSD-ports@ mailing list and 
ask detailed questions there.

-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
